scripts.build: find themes/openfreebooks/static -name '*.html' -delete && rm -f themes/openfreebooks/static/main.css public/main.css && bun run build:js && zola build && bun run index:search
scripts.index:search: pagefind --site public --glob "**/index.html" && rm -rf static/pagefind && cp -R public/pagefind static/pagefind
